author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 88912ef8. Added async_collective module with async_all_gather/async_reduce_scatter returning PendingCollective<T> handles. Wired into FSDP as prefetch_forward_params() which kicks off async all_gathers and stashes handles; forward() consumes them in place of sync all_gather, hiding collective latency behind caller-inserted local compute. Guards: only valid for FullShard; rejects double-prefetch. 7 new tests (3 async_collective + 4 FSDP prefetch); 88 distributed tests pass.
